#  Apache Flink 1.20.1 Release Announcement
February 12, 2025 - Alexander Fedulov
The Apache Flink Community is pleased to announce the first bug fix release of the Flink 1.20 series.
This release includes 75 bug fixes, vulnerability fixes,…
